items.caption: A close-up view of an open engine bay of a bmw e63 vehicle. the focus is on the air filter housing, which is open, revealing the air filter inside. the air filter is labeled with the text "air filter." the engine cover is partially lifted, and a hand is visible in the background, suggesting that the vehicle owner is in the process of changing the air filter. the environment appears to be a garage or a similar setting where maintenance work is being performed.
